pokemon:blipbug.name: Blipbug
pokemon:blipbug.summary: Often found in gardens, this Pokémon has hairs on its body that it uses to assess its surroundings.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Often found in gardens, this Pokémon has hairs on its body that it uses to assess its surroundings.
A constant collector of information, this Pokémon is very smart. Very strong is what it isn’t.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Often found in gardens, this Pokémon has hairs on its body that it uses to assess its surroundings.

pokemon:dottler.name: Dottler
pokemon:dottler.summary: As it grows inside its shell, it uses its psychic abilities to monitor the outside world and prepare for evolution.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: As it grows inside its shell, it uses its psychic abilities to monitor the outside world and prepare for evolution.
It barely moves, but it’s still alive. Hiding in its shell without food or water seems to have awakened its psychic powers.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: As it grows inside its shell, it uses its psychic abilities to monitor the outside world and prepare for evolution.

pokemon:orbeetle.name: Orbeetle
pokemon:orbeetle.summary: It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away.
It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away.
